name: CarGurus
description: CarGurus is an automotive marketplace providing REST APIs for dealer inventory management, vehicle pricing and market valuation, dealer performance analytics, consumer vehicle research, and dealer communications including SMS messaging.

itemListElement.name: CarGurus Dealer Stats API
itemListElement.description: Retrieves daily performance statistics for dealer inventory including search result page views, vehicle detail page clicks, and lead generation metrics across email, phone, chat, and SMS channels.
featureList: Email, phone, chat, and SMS lead metrics

itemListElement.name: CarGurus Instant Market Value API
itemListElement.description: Returns vehicle market valuations and deal ratings based on VIN, make, model, trim, mileage, and location data, enabling real-time price comparison and market positioning.
featureList: Deal ratings: GREAT_PRICE, GOOD_PRICE, OK_PRICE, FAIR_PRICE, POOR_PRICE, OVERPRICED

itemListElement.name: CarGurus Dealer Reviews API
itemListElement.description: Provides access to consumer dealer reviews including ratings, review text, author information, timestamps, and dealer management responses.

itemListElement.name: CarGurus Dealer SMS API
itemListElement.description: Enables dealers to send SMS and MMS messages to consumers, supporting text and media content for direct dealer-to-consumer communication through the CarGurus platform.
featureList: MMS media attachment support (up to 10 files)

itemListElement.name: CarGurus Car Selector API
itemListElement.description: Provides vehicle make and model lookup capabilities and generates search result URLs for new and used vehicle listings, supporting affiliate and partner integration.

itemListElement.name: CarGurus Body Type Groups API
itemListElement.description: Provides vehicle body type classification and translation data, mapping CarGurus body type identifiers to human-readable labels for vehicle search and filtering interfaces.
featureList: Sedan, pickup truck, SUV, and other body type keys
